subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden! The call is gentle and penetrating, manifesting at every moment through My Name, and its traces are made evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و امتی ندا لطیف است و نافذ در هر حین باسمی ظاهر و اثری از آن مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
